specialRules.name: Behavioral Health Services Tax
specialRules.description: An additional 1% tax on taxable income over $1,000,000 (California Proposition 63; renamed the Behavioral Health Services Tax).

citation.sourceDocument: California FTB 2025 California Tax Rate Schedules; 2026 standard deduction (FTB Form 540-ES)
citation.sourceNote: Bracket thresholds are the FTB 2025 California Tax Rate Schedules (Schedule X single/MFS, Schedule Y MFJ/QSS, Schedule Z head of household) — the most recent rate schedule the FTB has published; the 2026-indexed brackets are not yet issued, so these latest-published values are used (a small under-index vs. an unknown ~3% CCPI bump). The 2026 standard deduction ($5,706 single/MFS, $11,412 MFJ/HoH/QSS) is confirmed from the FTB 2026 Form 540-ES estimated-tax worksheet. The 1% Behavioral Health Services Tax (Prop 63) applies to taxable income over $1,000,000.
